records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: Daher hast du beschlossen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Vous avez donc d959cid959

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. Quite a lot of time has passed since I sealed away my memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. Quite a lot of time has passed since I sealed away my memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. Quite a lot of time has passed since I sealed away my memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now it's all clear again, as if the fog has lifted. The oath we shared, the memories of the previous world... Even the faith I once cast aside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now it's all clear again, as if the fog has lifted. The oath we shared, the memories of the previous world... Even the faith I once cast aside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now it's all clear again, as if the fog has lifted. The oath we shared, the memories of the previous world... Even the faith I once cast aside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know it was necessary to bind Tammiel. Still, forgetting that vengeance, even for a time, feels shameful.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know it was necessary to bind Tammiel. Still, forgetting that vengeance, even for a time, feels shameful.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know it was necessary to bind Tammiel. Still, forgetting that vengeance, even for a time, feels shameful.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Soon enough, I'll need to settle things with her properly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Soon enough, I'll need to settle things with her properly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Soon enough, I'll need to settle things with her properly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But before that, I must face the mistakes I created myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But before that, I must face the mistakes I created myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But before that, I must face the mistakes I created myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Do I remember when we first met?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Do I remember when we first met?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Do I remember when we first met?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That question is very clearly meant to tease me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That question is very clearly meant to tease me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That question is very clearly meant to tease me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I do. You mistook me for a lost child and patted my head, so I bent your wrist in return.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I do. You mistook me for a lost child and patted my head, so I bent your wrist in return.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I do. You mistook me for a lost child and patted my head, so I bent your wrist in return.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even after that, you kept talking to me so casually that I thought you were just another arrogant fool, drunk on your own confidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even after that, you kept talking to me so casually that I thought you were just another arrogant fool, drunk on your own confidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even after that, you kept talking to me so casually that I thought you were just another arrogant fool, drunk on your own confidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, I know now that it was all a misunderstanding and that you're simply a good person who happens to lack tact.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, I know now that it was all a misunderstanding and that you're simply a good person who happens to lack tact.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, I know now that it was all a misunderstanding and that you're simply a good person who happens to lack tact.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A great deal of time has passed since then, but I want to say this now. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A great deal of time has passed since then, but I want to say this now. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A great deal of time has passed since then, but I want to say this now. Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know redesigning those massive Terrabrains to match my height after we met wasn't a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know redesigning those massive Terrabrains to match my height after we met wasn't a coincidence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know redesigning those massive Terrabrains to match my height after we met wasn't a coincidence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I'm sorry for the misunderstanding. And thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I'm sorry for the misunderstanding. And thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I'm sorry for the misunderstanding. And thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And right after that, you squat down to look me in the eye. That's very like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...And right after that, you squat down to look me in the eye. That's very like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...And right after that, you squat down to look me in the eye. That's very like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...? You'll give me a chance at revenge, so I should pat your head as much as I like?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...? You'll give me a chance at revenge, so I should pat your head as much as I like?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...? You'll give me a chance at revenge, so I should pat your head as much as I like?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, honestly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, honestly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, honestly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...That's very like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...That's very like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...That's very like you.
